title: Practices with Children Aged 0-2 in Foster Care: Foster Care Survey 2023
description: The data focus on the views of foster care workers and foster parents on practices that support the participation and rights of children aged 0-2 in foster care or urgent placements. The respondents are social workers, child welfare workers, and foster parents. The material was collected as part of Pesäpuu ry's Pikku-Tiikerit development project, which received funding from the Funding Centre for Social Welfare and Health Organisations (STEA).
